prompt: Character design of NARA, a friendly young teenage climate explorer and cartographer girl for an educational geography game (age ~13, warm brown skin, dark curly hair in a practical ponytail, big curious kind eyes, small confident smile). She wears a modern expedition outfit: a rugged khaki and teal explorer vest with pockets, a rolled paper map tucked under one arm, a small compass on the vest. Semi-realistic clean painterly cartoon style, mature and sober (NOT babyish, suitable for 11 to 15 year olds), competent and approachable. Whole body, front view, standing, centered, generous margin, thick closed dark outline around the character, on a plain flat pure solid white background #FFFFFF, absolutely no ground shadow, prepared for transparent cutout. Vivid cohesive premium illustration. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers.
